info.title: nuget-plc
info.description: A CLI tool to help you manage the lifecycle of NuGet packages, e.g. deprecate packages. Contains the "nuget-plc" .NET tool.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A CLI tool to help you manage the lifecycle of published NuGet packages.

arguments.name: PACKAGE_ID
arguments.description: The ID of the package that should be deprecated.
